title: Verifiable Participant Points (VPP): an open-source blockchain ledger for survey participation credits
description: VPP is an open-source system for recording survey participation credits as tamper-proof, pseudonymous transactions on the Base layer-2 blockchain. The system consists of an upgradable smart contract, a stateless transaction-relay backend that covers all gas fees on behalf of students, and a React frontend with internationalised German and English UI. Wallets can be created in-app, no prior knowledge of cryptocurrencies is required, and the institution covers all transaction costs. The repository contains the complete source code, deployment manifests, operational runbooks, the de-identified usability evaluation data set (N = 99, two waves), and the analysis script that reproduces every number reported in the accompanying Behavior Research Methods manuscript.

creators.name: Strakeljahn, Joris
creators.affiliation: Bielefeld University of Applied Sciences and Arts (HSBI)
